1.gl: to go or come (in a wide variety of applications)
1.kj: abide, apply, attain, [idiom] be, befall, [phrase] besiege, bring (forth, in, into, to pass), call, carry, [idiom] certainly, (cause, let, thing for) to come (against, in, out, upo

1.gl: a sea (as breaking in noisy surf) or large body of water; specifically (with the article), the Mediterranean Sea; sometimes a large river, or an artifical basin; locally, the west, or (rarely) the south
1.dv: from an unused root meaning to roar;

1.gl: properly, to slide by, i.e. (by implication) to hasten away, pass on, spring up, pierce or change
1.kj: abolish, alter, change, cut off, go on forward, grow up, be over, pass (away, on, through), renew, sprout, strike through.

1.gl: a burden; specifically, tribute, or (abstractly) porterage; figuratively, an utterance, chiefly adoom, especially singing; mental, desire
1.kj: burden, carry away, prophecy, [idiom] they set, song, tribute.

1.gl: to fear; morally, to revere; caus. to frighten
1.kj: affright, be (make) afraid, dread(-ful), (put in) fear(-ful, -fully, -ing), (be had in) reverence(-end), [idiom] see, terrible (act, -ness, thing).

1.gl: the south (from its drought); specifically, the Negeb or southern district of Judah, occasionally, Egypt (as south to Palestine)
1.dv: from an unused root meaning to be parched;

2.gl: to ascend, intransitively (be high) or actively (mount); used in a great variety of senses, primary and secondary, literal and figurative
2.kj: arise (up), (cause to) ascend up, at once, break (the day) (up), bring (up), (cause to) burn, carry up, cast up, [phrase] shew, climb (up), (cause to, make to) come (up), cut off,

2.gl: properly, to front, i.e. stand boldly out opposite; by implication (causatively), to manifest; figuratively, to announce (always by word of mouth to one present); specifically, to expose, predict, explain, praise
2.kj: bewray, [idiom] certainly, certify, declare(-ing), denounce, expound, [idiom] fully, messenger, plainly, profess, rehearse, report, shew (forth), speak, [idiom] surely, tell, utter

2.gl: to repose, i.e. desist from exertion; used in many implied relations (causative, figurative or specific)
2.kj: (cause to, let, make to) cease, celebrate, cause (make) to fail, keep (sabbath), suffer to be lacking, leave, put away (down), (make to) rest, rid, still, take away.

2.gl: to cover (with a garment); figuratively, to act covertly; by implication, to pillage
2.kj: deal deceitfully (treacherously, unfaithfully), offend, transgress(-or), (depart), treacherous (dealer, -ly, man), unfaithful(-ly, man), [idiom] very.

2.gl: to cramp, i.e. confine (in many applications, literally and figuratively, formative or hostile)
2.kj: adversary, assault, beset, besiege, bind (up), cast, distress, fashion, fortify, inclose, lay siege, put up in bags.
churlish, cruel, grievous, hard((-hearted), thing), heavy, [phrase] impudent, obstinate, prevailed, rough(-ly), sore, sorrowful, stiff(necked), stubborn, [phrase] in trouble.

3.gl: to tremble inwardly (or palpitate), i.e. (figuratively) be (causative, make) (suddenly) alarmed or agitated; by implication to hasten anxiously
3.kj: be (make) affrighted (afraid, amazed, dismayed, rash), (be, get, make) haste(-n, -y, -ily), (give) speedy(-ily), thrust out, trouble, vex.

3.gl: a hinge (as pressed in turning); also a throe (as a phys. or mental pressure); also a herald or erranddoer (as constrained by the principal)
3.kj: ambassador, hinge, messenger, pain, pang, sorrow. Compare H6736 (צִיר).

4.gl: to put (used in a great variety of applications, literal, figurative, inferentially, and elliptically)
4.kj: [idiom] any wise, appoint, bring, call (a name), care, cast in, change, charge, commit, consider, convey, determine, [phrase] disguise, dispose, do, get, give, heap up, hold, imput

4.gl: to vacillate, i.e. reel or stray (literally or figuratively); also causative of both
4.kj: (cause to) go astray, deceive, dissemble, (cause to, make to) err, pant, seduce, (make to) stagger, (cause to) wander, be out of the way.

4.gl: the heart (as the most interior organ);
4.kj: [phrase] bethink themselves, breast, comfortably, courage, ((faint), (tender-) heart(-ed), midst, mind, [idiom] unawares, understanding.
4.dv: from H3823 (לָבַב); used also like H3820 (לֵב)

4.gl: properly, a breeze, i.e. (by implication) dusk (when the evening breeze prevails)
4.kj: dark, dawning of the day (morning), night, twilight.

5.gl: to rise (in various applications, literal, figurative, intensive and causative)

5.dv: also (in plural) feminine מְגִנָּה; from H1598 (גָּנַן);

5.kj: [idiom] at all, burn up, consume, devour(-er, up), dine, eat(-er, up), feed (with), food, [idiom] freely, [idiom] in...wise(-deed, plenty), (lay) meat, [idiom] quite.
[idiom] assuredly, banquet, [idiom] certainly, drink(-er, -ing), drunk ([idiom] -ard), surely. (Prop. intensive of H8248 (שָׁקָה).)

5.gl: a head person (of any rank or class)
5.kj: captain (that had rule), chief (captain), general, governor, keeper, lord,(-task-)master, prince(-ipal), ruler, steward.

a vehicle; by implication, a team; by extension, cavalry; by analogy a rider, i.e. the upper millstone
7.kj: chariot, (upper) millstone, multitude (from the margin), wagon.

7.gl: hence, an acre (i.e. day's task for a yoke of cattle to plough)
7.kj: acre, couple, [idiom] together, two (donkeys), yoke (of oxen).

7.gl: to prick up the ears, i.e. hearken
7.kj: attend, (cause to) hear(-ken), give heed, incline, mark (well), regard.

13.kj: burden, carry away, prophecy, [idiom] they set, song, tribute.

13.gl: a copse of bushes; hence, a forest; hence, honey in the comb (as hived in trees)
13.dv: from an unused root probably meaning to thicken with verdure;

13.gl: Arab (i.e. Arabia), a country East of Palestine
13.dv: or עֲרַב; from H6150 (עָרַב) in the figurative sense of sterility;

13.gl: Dedanites, the descendants or inhabitants of Dedan

14.gl: properly, to sit down (specifically as judge. in ambush, in quiet); by implication, to dwell, to remain; causatively, to settle, to marry

14.kj: chase (away), [idiom] could not, depart, flee ([idiom] apace, away), (re-) move, thrust away, wander (abroad, -er, -ing).

14.gl: the earth (at large, or partitively a land)
14.kj: [idiom] common, country, earth, field, ground, land, [idiom] natins, way, [phrase] wilderness, world.
14.dv: from an unused root probably meaning to be firm;

14.gl: food (for man or beast), especially bread, or grain (for making it)
14.kj: (shew-) bread, [idiom] eat, food, fruit, loaf, meat, victuals.

14.gl: water; figuratively, juice; by euphemism, urine, semen

15.dv: plural (but always as singular) of an unused noun פָּנֶה; from H6437 (פָּנָה));

15.kj: chase (away), [idiom] could not, depart, flee ([idiom] apace, away), (re-) move, thrust away, wander (abroad, -er, -ing).

15.kj: archer, bend, come, draw, go (over), guide, lead (forth), thresh, tread (down), walk.

15.gl: a bow, forshooting (hence, figuratively, strength) or the iris
15.dv: from H7185 (קָשָׁה) in the original sense (of H6983 (קוֹשׁ)) of bending;

15.gl: drought; also a cutting instrument (from its destructive effect), as a knife, sword, or other sharp implement
15.kj: axe, dagger, knife, mattock, sword, tool.

Kedar, a son of Ishmael; also (collectively) Bedouin (as his descendants or representatives)
